description: Interactive animator for numeric variables with From→To display and play/reset controls. Use variableanimator when the variable value needs to animate over time, and pair it with playanimator to drive the animation. at() is optional — without it, the variable animates but renders no UI control. Pair with playanimator to drive the animation
utility: Animate variable value changes over time; other expressions referencing this variable update in real-time. Requires playanimator to start the animation. at() is optional for headless animation. at() is optional for headless animation

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position of the animator control on the canvas. When omitted, the variable animates but no UI control is rendered

arguments.name: variableName
arguments.description: Quoted variable name string, e.g. "t" — registers the variable in context with startValue

arguments.name: targetValue
arguments.description: Target value the variable animates toward

arguments.name: displayLabel
arguments.description: Optional quoted string to override the display label

examples.scenario: Animate SAS triangle angle from 20 to 120 degrees
examples.expression:
mathexpr_1 = variableanimator(at(1,4), "t", 20, 120)
graph_1 = g2d(at(3,17), size(25), range(-6,7), type(geometry))
triangle_1 = sas(graph_1, 5, t, 6, point(graph_1, 0, 0))
playanim_1 = playanimator(mathexpr_1, t(3))

mathexpr_1 = variableanimator(at(2,3), "r", 1, 4)
graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-6, 6), type(geometry))
center = point(graph_1, -1, 1)
circle_1 = circle(graph_1, center, radius(r))
playanim_1 = playanimator(mathexpr_1, t(2))

examples.scenario: Animate point along a spline path with ball image and tracepoint
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4, 5), 26, 30, range(-2,10), type(plotting))
S = spline(G, point(G, 0, 8), point(G, 1, 6), point(G, 2, 3), point(G, 3, 0))
var_anim = variableanimator(at(5,29), "t", 0, 1)
P = ratiopoint(G, S, t)
ball = image(G, "ball", P, 0.5)
play_1 = playanimator(var_anim)

examples.scenario: Animate secant line approaching tangent in limit lesson
examples.expression:
varanim_1 = variableanimator(at(2,3), "q1x", 2, 0.8)
q1 = point(graph_1, q1x, f(q1x))
line_2 = line(graph_1, p1, q1, c(red))
playanimator(varanim_1)

examples.scenario: Animate full rotation of a line segment
examples.expression:
mathexpr_1 = variableanimator(at(1,3), "a", 0, 360)
graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-6, 6), type(geometry))
line_1 = line(graph_1, point(graph_1, 0, 0), point(graph_1, 3, 0), type(segment), c(blue))
rotate_1 = rotate(graph_1, line_1, a)
playanim_1 = playanimator(mathexpr_1, t(3))

examples.scenario: Animate point along circle circumference using ratiopoint
examples.expression:
varanim_t = variableanimator(at(2,30), "t", 0, 1)
G = g2d(at(4,1), size(20), range(-6, 6), type(geometry))
A = point(G, 0, 0)
big_circle = circle(G, A, radius(4), c(steelblue), s(2))
P = ratiopoint(G, big_circle, t, c(red), s(4))
play_anim = playanimator(varanim_t, t(5))

examples.scenario: Animate parametric circular motion with trig functions, tracepoint, and multiple dependent shapes
examples.expression:
R = 4
r = 2
varanim_t = variableanimator(at(2,30), "t", 0, 360)
G = g2d(at(4,1), size(20), range(-6, 6), type(geometry))
origin = point(G, 0, 0, so(0))
big_circle = circle(G, origin, radius(4), c(steelblue), s(2))
cx(t) = r*cos(rad(t))
cy(t) = r*sin(rad(t))
tx(t) = R*cos(rad(t))
center_small = point(G, (cx(t), cy(t)), c(crimson))
small_circle = circle(G, center_small, radius(2), c(crimson), s(2), fc(pink), fo(0.15))
trace_point = point(G, tx(t), 0, c(red), s(4))
diameter = line(G, point(G, -4, 0), point(G, 4, 0), type(segment), c(gray))
radius_line = line(G, center_small, trace_point, type(segment), c(crimson))
trace_path = tracepoint(G, trace_point)
play_anim = playanimator(varanim_t, t(5))

examples.scenario: Unit circle with animated angle, sin/cos projections, tracetable, and play button
examples.expression:
varanim_t = variableanimator(at(2, 30), "t", 0, 360)
G = g2d(at(4, 1), size(20), range(-2, 2), type(geometry), grid())
O = point(G, 0, 0, s(3))
uc = circle(G, O, radius(1), c(steelblue), s(2))
P = anglepoint(G, uc, t, c(crimson), s(5))
radius_line = line(G, O, P, type(segment), c(gray))
xaxis_pt = point(G, 1, 0, defer())
angle_1 = angle(G, O, xaxis_pt, P, arcsize(35), arrowhead(start), c(orange), s(3))
cos_line = line(G, P, point(G, cos(rad(t)), 0, defer()), type(segment), c(dodgerblue), s(2))
sin_line = line(G, P, point(G, 0, sin(rad(t)), defer()), type(segment), c(tomato), s(2))
cos_pt = point(G, cos(rad(t)), 0, c(dodgerblue), s(4))
sin_pt = point(G, 0, sin(rad(t)), c(tomato), s(4))
trace_1 = tracepoint(G, P)
tt = tracetable(at(4, 24), slidingwindow(10), field(P, 'x', "cos theta"), field(P, 'y', "sin theta"), prec(3))
play_anim = playanimator(varanim_t, t(8), display("Play", "Playing..."))
